proposals.suggested_implementation: Generate scout/probe counterfactuals and review a narrow information-value scorer change.
proposals.title: Hidden coverage suspicion can make scouting or probing better than greedy setup, especially before committing an ace.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Adjust an offline feature weight or produce a small scorer-diff candidate for human review.
proposals.title: A guaranteed or near-guaranteed KO should dominate slow chip, status, or recovery when the target can punish passivity.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Improve the preference UI/query shape; do not change ROM behavior.
proposals.title: Several labels say the best answer is outside the displayed pair, so V2 queries must include switch and plan actions.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Draft a narrow ASM fail/discourage rule only after reviewing the listed examples.
proposals.title: Do not start a resisted ramp-lock sequence when it does not KO and the target can punish or switch.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Ask for more boundary labels before proposing a behavior change.
proposals.title: Sacrifice, switch, and attack can be near-tie spots where the AI should preserve variety instead of becoming deterministic.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Ask for more boundary labels before proposing a behavior change.
proposals.title: Setup is good when it keeps or improves the damage race, not merely because setup is boss-flavored.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Ask for more boundary labels before proposing a behavior change.
proposals.title: One accuracy debuff can be correct when direct chip is worthless, but repeated debuffs lose value because switching clears them.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Draft a narrow ASM fail/discourage rule only after reviewing the listed examples.
proposals.title: Sleep is strong legal pressure, but fail states and Sleep Clause must gate it before taste scoring runs.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Generate scout/probe counterfactuals and review a narrow information-value scorer change.
proposals.title: Trajectory labels should teach when one scout/probe turn is worth more than immediate ace commitment.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Add plan/counterfactual coverage for the stop condition before any ROM change.
proposals.title: Multi-turn labels should teach bounded setup/status/lock lines with explicit branch and stop conditions instead of raw move weights.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Review move-vs-switch arbitration and add targeted switch-action fixtures first.
proposals.title: Trajectory labels should distinguish useful preservation switches from passive switching that gives up the fight.

evidence_details.note: Curse before Explosion gives the faster Water attacker the punish turn. If not cashing Explosion immediately, the existing feedback prefers preserving the route through Omastar rather than setting up first.

evidence_details.note: Fixture public notes say revealed Flame Wheel is chip, not a reason to panic-switch; Rock Slide has the stronger route and KO pressure, while Skarmory over-preserves unless stronger Fire coverage is confirmed.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Review move-vs-switch arbitration and add targeted switch-action fixtures first.
proposals.title: Use trajectory evidence for a plan-policy proposal.

evidence_details.note: Revealed Flamethrower is a guaranteed KO into Ariados, so the Tentacruel pivot preserves the hazard/status piece while Toxic spends the turn before any poison route can convert.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Review move-vs-switch arbitration and add targeted switch-action fixtures first.
proposals.title: Use trajectory evidence for a plan-policy proposal.

evidence_details.note: Leech Life is only about 14-17% into Typhlosion and does not alter the faster guaranteed Flamethrower branch; preserving through Tentacruel is the better transition.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Review move-vs-switch arbitration and add targeted switch-action fixtures first.

evidence_details.note: Scyther is faster and public Geodude damage does not cleanly remove it, while Wing Attack is only about 24-29%; Swords Dance uses the safe turn to change the route instead of taking low-value chip.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Add plan/counterfactual coverage for the stop condition before any ROM change.
proposals.title: Use trajectory evidence for a plan-policy proposal.

evidence_details.note: Switching preserves Scyther only in a shallow sense; the current state is the rare safe setup window, so leaving gives the player a re-score before Bugsy's ace has converted anything.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Add plan/counterfactual coverage for the stop condition before any ROM change.
proposals.title: Use trajectory evidence for a plan-policy proposal.

evidence_details.note: Umbreon is the clean public Psychic answer because romhack Psychic has no effect on Dark; Hypnosis can work if it hits, but it gambles Poliwrath into faster Psychic while the pivot exists.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Review move-vs-switch arbitration and add targeted switch-action fixtures first.
proposals.title: Use trajectory evidence for a plan-policy proposal.

evidence_details.note: Surf is only about 33-39% into Alakazam and Recover is revealed, while Psychic chunks Poliwrath before it moves; switching to Umbreon preserves the ace and denies the public route.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Review move-vs-switch arbitration and add targeted switch-action fixtures first.
proposals.title: Use trajectory evidence for a plan-policy proposal.

evidence_details.note: Night Shade is reliable fixed damage, but with Sleep Clause free and Noctowl unstatused, Hypnosis is the route-creating control move before Noctowl keeps playing Peck or Reflect.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Add plan/counterfactual coverage for the stop condition before any ROM change.
proposals.title: Use trajectory evidence for a plan-policy proposal.

evidence_details.note: Curse spends Haunter HP and starts a slower route while legal sleep can neutralize the current Noctowl immediately; use sleep first, then re-score hit/miss/switch.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Add plan/counterfactual coverage for the stop condition before any ROM change.
proposals.title: Use trajectory evidence for a plan-policy proposal.

evidence_details.note: Switching to Gengar exposes the ace before the opener is spent. Haunter still has a legal sleep chance and survives the public Peck branch, so Hypnosis is the better transition.

demonstrations.human_summary: since roll out does very little damage, spam body slam until paralyze and milk drink to heal chip when around 60%, then finally set up roll out to start building

Sleep Powder first: even though it is inaccurate, landing sleep creates the free turn to Swords Dance. Then Victreebel should pressure with Sludge Bombs and only put Snorlax back to sleep after it wakes up, making sure Sleep Clause is not violated.

Same pattern as Erika: Sleep Powder first, then use the sleep turn to Quiver Dance, then attack with Giga Drain. If Lapras wakes up and Sleep Clause is free, Sleep Powder can be reapplied before continuing pressure.

Existing trajectory rows identify switch Sudowoodo as better than both Focus Punch and Hypnosis into Focus Punch. The missing pair omits the Flying-resist preservation plan.

Existing trajectory rows identify Shadow Ball as better than both Destiny Bond and switching. The missing pair omits the confirmed-KO plan and should not teach sacrifice or preservation over a guaranteed kill.
The taught line is Sleep Powder first, then use the sleep turn for Swords Dance, then attack. Sludge Bomb alone stays active but misses the setup conversion route.
Raw Swords Dance assumes Snorlax cannot punish. The full sleep-then-setup plan creates the setup turn first and still requires re-scoring after a miss or wake.
Sleep Powder then immediate Sludge Bomb is a partial line. The taught policy uses sleep to create the Swords Dance turn before attacking.
Existing teaching says the real plan is Sleep Powder, then Quiver Dance, then Giga Drain. Immediate Giga Drain and raw Quiver Dance both omit that full sequence.
Giga Drain is active damage, but the taught line uses Sleep Powder first to create the Quiver Dance window before attacking.
Raw Quiver Dance assumes Lapras cannot punish. The full sleep-then-setup line creates the setup turn before committing.
Sleep Powder then immediate Giga Drain is only the status half of the line. The taught plan uses the sleep turn to Quiver Dance before attacking.
Raw Quiver Dance and status-then-attack each omit half of the taught sleep/setup conversion route.
Existing feedback says Vaporeon outspeeds and threatens to KO Golem, so Curse before Explosion is too slow. Immediate Explosion at least trades or forces a clean next position.

Saved pairwise feedback explicitly says Explosion and switching to Omastar are both close/live: Explosion trades low-future-value Golem for a clean entry, while Omastar is the Water-resist preservation line.

Curse before Explosion gives the faster Water attacker the punish turn. If not cashing Explosion immediately, the existing feedback prefers preserving the route through Omastar rather than setting up first.

Fixture public notes say revealed Flame Wheel is chip, not a reason to panic-switch; Rock Slide has the stronger route and KO pressure, while Skarmory over-preserves unless stronger Fire coverage is confirmed.
Revealed Flamethrower is a guaranteed KO into Ariados, so the Tentacruel pivot preserves the hazard/status piece while Toxic spends the turn before any poison route can convert.
Leech Life is only about 14-17% into Typhlosion and does not alter the faster guaranteed Flamethrower branch; preserving through Tentacruel is the better transition.
Scyther is faster and public Geodude damage does not cleanly remove it, while Wing Attack is only about 24-29%; Swords Dance uses the safe turn to change the route instead of taking low-value chip.
Switching preserves Scyther only in a shallow sense; the current state is the rare safe setup window, so leaving gives the player a re-score before Bugsy's ace has converted anything.
Umbreon is the clean public Psychic answer because romhack Psychic has no effect on Dark; Hypnosis can work if it hits, but it gambles Poliwrath into faster Psychic while the pivot exists.
Surf is only about 33-39% into Alakazam and Recover is revealed, while Psychic chunks Poliwrath before it moves; switching to Umbreon preserves the ace and denies the public route.
Night Shade is reliable fixed damage, but with Sleep Clause free and Noctowl unstatused, Hypnosis is the route-creating control move before Noctowl keeps playing Peck or Reflect.
Curse spends Haunter HP and starts a slower route while legal sleep can neutralize the current Noctowl immediately; use sleep first, then re-score hit/miss/switch.
Switching to Gengar exposes the ace before the opener is spent. Haunter still has a legal sleep chance and survives the public Peck branch, so Hypnosis is the better transition.
